## Type

- [ ] Content (event / character / copy)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build` pass locally
- [ ] New flags registered in `src/engine/flags.json` (if content)
- [ ] Stays true to the non-negotiables: barriers are data, no "you lost" screen, person-first language
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
